name: S2E5 归途
desc: 中考方向·陷阱猎人版配套题库 · 15 道单选（时态语态/从句非谓语连词/词汇辨析）。低生词、高选项迷惑；世界观：初代双璧梓与增归来，七年空课桌有了主人，黑域噤声。暗号 HOMEROOM。

m5.q: The two desks by the window ___ empty since the first students left the valley.
m5.why: since＋延续到说话此刻（课桌至今空着）→ 现在完成时 have been。

m5.q: That night, word of the return ___ at every corner of the swamp.
m5.why: appear 是不及物动词，没有被动语态；that night 锁一般过去 → appeared。

m5.q: A wide welcome banner was ___ across the homeroom door by the little ones the night before.
m5.why: was＋过去分词构成被动；『悬挂』的变化是 hang-hung-hung（hanged 只用于绞刑）→ was hung。核心词 hung。

m5.q: ___ when the bell rang did the whole class believe it was real.
m5.why: Only＋状语置于句首引起部分倒装（did the class believe）；其余词不触发倒装。核心词 Only。

m5.q: “You ___ be Zi! The deer-horned senior from the legend!” the little ones cried.
m5.why: 肯定推测『你一定是』→ must be；语气最强、最贴合又惊又喜的情境。核心词 must。

m5.q: ___ the room had changed a lot, she found her old seat in three seconds.
m5.why: 『尽管教室大变，她仍三秒找到』→ 让步 Even though。核心词 Even。

m5.q: ___ after seven years, the two seniors still remembered every corner of the valley.
m5.why: 主语 seniors 主动发出 return（不及物）→ 现在分词 Returning 作状语。核心词 Returning。

m5.q: ___ the deer-horned senior stepped in, the noisy room went quiet.
m5.why: 『一旦/当她一走进来，教室就安静了』→ Once。核心词 Once。

m5.q: Hurry up, ___ we'll miss the opening of the welcome ceremony!
m5.why: 祈使句＋or＝否则（快点，否则就错过开场）。核心词 or。

m5.q: At that moment, everyone understood what the chalk line had ___ all these years.
m5.why: had＋过去分词构成过去完成时 → meant；宾语从句保持陈述语序。核心词 meant。

m5.q: Could you ___ me your class album? I'll give it back right after the ceremony.
m5.why: 把东西借给我＝lend me sth；说话人稍后归还，方向是『借出』。

m5.q: The bear senior ___ his big hand first, just like seven years ago.
m5.why: 及物动词 raise＋宾语 his hand（举起手）；叙事过去 → raised。

m5.q: Seven years is long, but ___ things in the homeroom have really changed — the desks, the chalk, even the smell are all the same.
m5.why: 后文『全都没变』锁定否定义『几乎没有』；things 可数复数 → few。

m5.q: Oh no, I ___ my welcome gift for the seniors at home!
m5.why: 『把东西忘在某地』必须用 leave＋地点（left ... at home）；forget 不接地点。

m5.q: The little ones are looking forward to ___ the legend duel with their own eyes.
m5.why: look forward to 中 to 是介词，后接动名词 watching。
